text.title: QA Test Data Catalog Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are tests creating fixtures ad-hoc with drift symptoms or PII concerns?

text.example: Inventory finds 47 fixtures across 12 files. 8 reuse the same shape (OrderFactory variants). Consolidate to 4 catalog factories. PII matrix flags 3 fixtures (user-with-email) — switch to faker. Catalog committed; lint rule blocks Order.objects.create in tests.
